text:
- Update to 4.86A
Support for 10.0-CURRENT
NOTE: Until at least the amd64 headers/clang builtins are harmonized, 
we (Vic Abell, Author, and myself (ler@lerctr.org), Maintainer) will
NOT support clang as the compiler for lsof.

- CVS/Entries
- CVS/Repository
- CVS/Root
- CVS/Tag
